caveats: The generated mouth and muzzle contain fused geometry.
Detached white fragments are visible beside the hind-leg region.
This Pixal3D output must not enter rigging or animation.
decisions.notes: The requested lighter open-tricolor appearance survived image-to-3D, but the deterministic Pixal3D canary failed the static topology gate. Preserve it as backend-comparison evidence and continue the same authenticated reference through the TRELLIS fallback.
